changes: after final lock, installer endpoints now redirect directly to admin login instead of rendering 423 failsafe page
recovery codes are now pre-generated right after successful execution step
recovery step now reuses existing codes and no longer regenerates them if already present
fixed first execution failure on mysql/mariadb installers: migration runner now checks PDO::inTransaction before commit/rollback
prevented false "There is no active transaction" after DDL implicit commit
fixed install 419 after database test by disabling CSRF rotation in install area
db-test endpoint now returns refreshed csrf token in JSON payload
installer js now updates hidden _csrf field from db-test response for cross-hosting stability
settings routes migrated to clean paths (/settings/general|mail|security) with backward redirect support
admin notifications moved from URL query to session flash and floating auto-close toasts
global router fix for section path constraints preventing failsafe 500 on front/admin routes
global failsafe handlers with incident classification, secure logging and safe fallback renderer
maintenance engine upgraded with levels, reason/message, IP/admin whitelist and superadmin bypass guardrails
system health check and monitoring services exposed in admin pages and dashboard widgets
native minimal CLI tool added (version/health/cache/logs/install/maintenance/modules/admin hard reset)
core test matrix documentation and smoke runner added (037)
release freeze, RC checklist and go/no-go templates documented (038)
legal finalization set completed and installer legal bundle extended (039)
terrain release execution plan and checklist documented (040)
boot area resolution now reads runtime admin_path before route zone detection
legacy /admin/* URLs are redirected to configured admin_path to avoid login 404 after path changes
public/admin.php default URI now targets configured admin login path
release packaging cleaned for fresh install (no installed lock, no recovery artifacts, no bundled sqlite runtime db)
standalone zip output moved to repository root release folder
github README refreshed with badges, php prerequisites and release commands
standalone zip packaging finalization with root entry files, release docs and verified build artifacts
release scripts improved with manifest generation and robust package verification checks
ui/feature pre-lock review completed with targeted cta and safety confirmations fixes
standalone routing engine added (request/response/collection/resolver/dispatcher/pipeline/guard/context)
strict route resolution with zone separation and admin custom path safety
module routes loading conventions with manifest guards and conflict checks
routing exceptions + URL generator + route helpers integrated into core router facade
standalone boot system entrypoints via core/env|config|security|boot|router
core install-lock guard supports storage/install.lock and storage/install/installed.lock
global security bootstrap now applies baseline headers and request input sanitation
